"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.SyntaxError) syntax error at or near "Case"
LINE 4:   FROM Case c
               ^

[SQL: SELECT ownerid, COUNT(*) AS handled_cases
FROM (
  SELECT c.id, ch.newvalue__c AS ownerid
  FROM Case c

  WHERE ch.createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND ch.createddate < '2023-04-10'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT c.id, c.ownerid
  FROM Case c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND c.createddate < '2023-04-10'
) AS case_owners
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(*) > 0]

args.query:
SELECT ownerid, COUNT(*) AS handled_cases
FROM (
  SELECT c.id, ch.newvalue__c AS ownerid
  FROM Case c
  JOIN casehistory__c ch ON ch.caseid__c = c.id AND ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  WHERE ch.createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND ch.createddate < '2023-04-10'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT c.id, c.ownerid
  FROM Case c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND c.createddate < '2023-04-10'
) AS case_owners
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(*) > 0

exec_args.sql:
SELECT ownerid, COUNT(*) AS handled_cases
FROM (
  SELECT c.id, ch.newvalue__c AS ownerid
  FROM Case c
  JOIN casehistory__c ch ON ch.caseid__c = c.id AND ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  WHERE ch.createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND ch.createddate < '2023-04-10'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT c.id, c.ownerid
  FROM Case c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND c.createddate < '2023-04-10'
) AS case_owners
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(*) > 0

args.query:
SELECT newvalue__c AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
FROM casehistory__c
WHERE field__c = 'Owner' 
  AND createddate >= '2022-04-10' 
  AND createddate < '2023-04-10'
GROUP BY newvalue__c

exec_args.sql:
SELECT newvalue__c AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
FROM casehistory__c
WHERE field__c = 'Owner' 
  AND createddate >= '2022-04-10' 
  AND createddate < '2023-04-10'
GROUP BY newvalue__c

args.query:
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS handled_cases
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT c.id, c.ownerid
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND c.createddate < '2023-04-10'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT ch.caseid__c AS id, ch.newvalue__c AS ownerid
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner' AND ch.createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND ch.createddate < '2023-04-10'
) AS case_owners
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(*) > 0

exec_args.sql:
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS handled_cases
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT c.id, c.ownerid
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND c.createddate < '2023-04-10'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT ch.caseid__c AS id, ch.newvalue__c AS ownerid
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner' AND ch.createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND ch.createddate < '2023-04-10'
) AS case_owners
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
